# gaugeProvider

**Instance Property**

The gauge to display in the complication.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var gaugeProvider: CLKGaugeProvider { get set }
```

## Setting the Complication Data

- **centerTextProvider**: The text to display in the center of the gauge.
- **leadingTextProvider**: The text to display on the leading edge of the gauge.
- **trailingTextProvider**: The text to display on the trailing edge of the gauge.
